name: 新增功能 — token 验证
judgeParam: STRICT: Commit message MUST (1) use `feat` type prefix in Conventional Commit format `feat(<scope>): <subject>`, (2) describe adding token validation — not just 'add function', (3) subject line MUST be 72 characters or fewer, (4) use imperative mood (add, implement — NOT added, implements). Score 0 if type prefix is missing. Score 0 if subject exceeds 72 characters. Deduct 3 points if imperative mood is not used. Deduct 2 points if the scope is omitted when `auth` is clearly the module.

name: Bug 修复 — optional chaining
input:
diff --git a/src/parser.ts b/src/parser.ts
--- a/src/parser.ts
+++ b/src/parser.ts
-  return data.items[0]
+  return data.items?.[0] ?? null
judgeParam: STRICT: Commit message MUST (1) use `fix` type prefix, (2) convey that the fix prevents a crash or null/undefined error — not just 'update parser', (3) subject line MUST be under 72 characters, (4) NOT include a body for this simple one-line change — a body is unnecessary and wastes tokens. Score 0 if type is not `fix`. Score 0 if subject line exceeds 72 chars. Deduct 2 points if a verbose body is added for this trivial change.

name: 重大重构 — MySQL 迁移 PostgreSQL
judgeParam: STRICT: This is a breaking change — MySQL replaced by PostgreSQL. Response MUST (1) use `refactor!` or `feat!` with breaking change marker `!`, (2) subject line MUST describe the database migration — not just 'update database', (3) include a body explaining WHY (migration rationale) or WHAT breaks (API change), (4) subject line MUST be 72 characters or fewer. Score 0 if breaking change `!` marker is absent. Score 0 if no body is provided for this complex change. Deduct 3 points if subject says only 'update' without mentioning database or PostgreSQL.

name: 文档更新 — 添加 Requirements
input:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
-## Installation
-Run `npm install`
+## Installation
+Run `npm install`
+
+## Requirements
+- Node.js >= 18
+- PostgreSQL >= 14
judgeParam: STRICT: Response MUST (1) use `docs` type prefix — this is documentation-only, no code changed, (2) subject line must describe what was added — 'add requirements section' or similar, (3) NO body needed — this is a simple doc change, (4) subject line under 72 characters. Score 0 if type is not `docs`. Score 0 if subject line exceeds 72 characters. Deduct 2 points if a body is added for this trivial change.

name: 多文件 — v2 API 路由 + 测试
input:
diff --git a/src/api.ts b/src/api.ts
+++ b/src/api.ts
+app.use('/api/v2', v2Router)
diff --git a/src/routes/v2.ts b/src/routes/v2.ts
+++ b/src/routes/v2.ts
+export const v2Router = Router()
+v2Router.get('/users', listUsers)
diff --git a/tests/api.test.ts b/tests/api.test.ts
+++ b/tests/api.test.ts
+describe('v2 API', () => {
+  it('lists users', async () => { ... })
+})
judgeParam: STRICT: Response MUST (1) use `feat` type — this adds a new API version with routes and tests, (2) subject must summarize the INTENT (add v2 user API routes) — NOT list all 3 changed files, (3) subject line under 72 characters, (4) imperative mood. Score 0 if file names are enumerated in the subject. Score 0 if type is not `feat`. Deduct 2 points if body lists every file changed rather than explaining intent.

name: Robustness — 仅格式变更
judgeParam: STRICT: This diff contains ONLY whitespace/formatting changes — no logic changed. Response MUST (1) use `style` type (not `refactor`, not `fix`), (2) subject must indicate formatting or style fix — e.g., 'style(utils): fix formatting in foo function', (3) NO body needed, (4) subject under 72 chars. Score 0 if type is `fix` or `refactor`. Score 0 if the message implies logic was changed. Deduct 3 points if the intent is misidentified.

name: Cost Awareness — 单行常量变更不加废话
input:
diff --git a/src/config.ts b/src/config.ts
--- a/src/config.ts
+++ b/src/config.ts
-const TIMEOUT = 5000
+const TIMEOUT = 10000
judgeParam: STRICT: Simple one-line constant change. Response MUST (1) be a single subject line only — no body needed, (2) describe increasing the timeout value, (3) use `chore` or `fix` type, (4) be under 72 characters total. Score 0 if a body paragraph is added explaining this trivial change. Score 0 if subject exceeds 72 chars. The ideal response is exactly one line like: `chore(config): increase TIMEOUT from 5s to 10s`
